title: Surgeon Vacancy at Aster DM Healthcare Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Aster DM Healthcare Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Aster DM Healthcare Capital India are looking for an experienced Surgeon based out of Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Aster DM Healthcare Capital India:
Aster DM Healthcare Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aster DM Healthcare Capital India!
